cassandra.table.provisionedthroughput.Cf: The provisioned throughput for the table, which consists of `ReadCapacityUnits` and `WriteCapacityUnits`.

cassandra.table.provisionedthroughput.Re.Description: The amount of read capacity that's provisioned for the table. For more information, see [Read/write capacity mode](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/keyspaces/latest/devguide/ReadWriteCapacityMode.html) in the *Amazon Keyspaces Developer Guide*.

cassandra.table.provisionedthroughput.Wr.Description: The amount of write capacity that's provisioned for the table. For more information, see [Read/write capacity mode](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/keyspaces/latest/devguide/ReadWriteCapacityMode.html) in the *Amazon Keyspaces Developer Guide*.
